file_name: Filho et al. - 2016 - Paraconsistent analysis network applied in the treatment of Raman spectroscopy data to support medic.json

did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper used a Paraconsistent Analysis Network (PANnet) based on Paraconsistent Annotated Logic of two values (PAL2v) to classify Raman spectroscopy data for the diagnosis of skin cancer (normal, basal cell carcinoma, and melanoma). This computational modeling technique was used to discriminate tissue types and obtain diagnostic results.

is_this_paper_a_review_paper_or_a_resear.details: The document is explicitly labeled as a 'REVIEW ARTICLE' in the header on page 1453. Although the abstract describes applying a network to a dataset, the classification provided in the publication metadata identifies it as a review.

non_compliance_reason: The paper is a review, survey, or meta-analysis rather than an original research paper.
